headline: Synopsys Is the ‘Growth Trap’ Your Advisor Won’t Warn You About
summary: The bear case on SNPS is structural. Synopsys (NASDAQ:SNPS) gets lumped in with the AI hardware winners because it sells the software that designs the chips. The narrative is clean. The financial model is something else entirely. Synopsys sits inside a duopoly with Cadence (NASDAQ:CDNS) in electronic design automation, plus a semiconductor IP catalog. It also ... Synopsys Is the ‘Growth Trap’ Your Advisor Won’t Warn You About

headline: The AI Bubble That Isn't: Why Nvidia, Micron Still Look Cheap
summary: BofA says company fundamentals do not support the semiconductor bubble narrative. Nvidia, Micron and Credo trade below historical P/E.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Cadence Design Systems, Raises Price Target to $425
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Joe Quatrochi   maintains Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $400 to $425.
